mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piiordersteptablewait (orderid, jobid, version, stepid, db, owner, table_name, type, db_w, owner_w, table_name_w) values (#{orderid}, #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db_w, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{owner_w, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{table_name_w, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
